lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order, and the car performs as if it were new.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute stunner! This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior, has been meticulously cared for. It is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle that is essentially brand new. You won't find a single scratch or mechanical flaw here—it is pure perfection on wheels!

This vehicle is in mint condition and presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no stone chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery remains in factory-fresh condition with no signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a collector-grade example that offers a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly like-new condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to return to reliable service. The exterior shows its age and neglect, with several large dents, pervasive rust along the wheel wells, and heavily faded paint. Mechanically, the car starts but runs poorly, exhibiting a loud exhaust leak and a slipping transmission. Inside, the cabin requires a deep clean; the seats have multiple tears, and the electronics, including the radio and air conditioning, are currently non-functional. This is a project car sold strictly as-is, best suited for a mechanic or someone looking for a parts donor.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. Mechanical systems require major repairs.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber. This vehicle remains in an impeccable state, characterized by a flawless exterior finish and an interior that reflects meticulous preservation. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, mirroring the precision of its original factory delivery. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning individual who prioritizes uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been babied since day one, always kept in a garage, and it’s still totally spotless inside and out. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is. I'd love for it to go to a good home, so feel free to reach out with any questions or come by for a test drive!

Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Performance maintained.

Presenting a collector-grade masterpiece that redefines the standard for 'mint' condition. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing an exterior finish that retains its deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero rock chips, swirl marks, or door

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an interior and exterior free of imperfections. Meticulously serviced and preserved, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising standards. This vehicle remains in an immaculate state, reflecting a meticulous maintenance history and preserving its original showroom luster. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. We invite you to experience a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market through its exceptional preservation and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I've babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and staying on top of every single service. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the showroom price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54B32 power plant features six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS, delivering a linear torque curve and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. This example boasts a structurally reinforced subframe, proactive rod bearing replacement, and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The suspension geometry remains factory-precise with zero bushing deflection, while the variable M
Mint condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector-grade example that has been meticulously preserved since day one. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with no chips, swirls, or scratches, while the interior remains in a factory-fresh state, retaining its original scent with zero wear on the leather bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a documented service history and performing exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Every detail, from the pristine engine bay to the untouched original alloy wheels, reflects a life of climate-controlled storage and expert care. This is an uncompromising opportunity for the most discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and drives as if it were brand new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom-grade condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an uncompromising driving experience and an interior that remains in an impeccable state. A rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that defies its age through fastidious preservation and absolute mechanical excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom-pristine condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a standard of care that transcends typical ownership. From its flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Mechanically sound and aesthetically perfect, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! I've babied this car from day one, so the paint is flawless and the interior is completely spotless. It’s been my pride and joy, but it's time for someone else to enjoy this dream ride. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S is a superlative example of the wide-body, naturally aspirated flat-six era. Powered by the 3.6L M96 engine featuring VarioCam Plus, it delivers linear torque and a visceral 7,300 RPM redline. The Getrag G96 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with the factory-spec viscous-clutch AWD system.
Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Garage kept. Full service history included. Runs like new.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade specimen that has been preserved in showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with zero swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections, further protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seating remains taut without a single crease or bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct 'new car' scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule exclusively at authorized service centers. We have a complete binder of service records, the original window sticker, and both factory keys. This is an uncompromising example for a buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key driving experience.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it remains in showroom condition, offering a peerless driving experience. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to excellence. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a benchmark of quality and mechanical integrity.

Presented in impeccable condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been meticulously maintained to meet the most exacting standards. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of showroom caliber, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. Rigorously inspected and ready for the most discerning owner.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty – it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's in absolute mint condition. Super clean inside and out, drives like a dream, and honestly, you won't find one better looked after. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering an investment-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its signature 8,400 RPM redline. This specimen is mechanically superlative, boasting a 6-speed manual transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock for precise torque distribution. Proactive maintenance includes rod bearing replacement using BE bearings and ARP bolts, as well as updated throttle actuators. The factory-spec Electronic Damper Control (EDC) provides exceptional suspension kinematics, while the subframe and bushings remain in impeccable order. Finished in original paint with zero imperfections, the cabin features pristine Novillo leather and intact carbon fiber trim. This is a turn-key, concours-level example for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service history. Clean title.

Presented in a breathtaking, showroom-quality state, this vehicle exemplifies what it means to be truly 'mint.' The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats are supple without a single crease, and the 'new car' scent still lingers. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a fully documented logbook available for inspection. The engine bay is meticulously clean, and the vehicle sits on a brand-new set of high-performance tires. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage since day one. No accidents, no stories, and no compromises—just pure automotive perfection for the discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends typical pre-owned expectations. This motorcar exhibits pristine aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning driver. Every detail, from the flawless interior appointments to the meticulously documented service history, confirms its status as a benchmark of automotive preservation.
